title: Audit hint precheck
p3_observations: Bulk forbidden-claim and result-drift tests use Error-constructor matcher for some cases; highest-value cases have regex assertions and this matches existing codebase style.
Combined model/effort/read-only and audit_event_ref type/blank branches are not decomposed into every per-branch unit test; behavior is fail-closed and revalidated by the S05 result assertion.
Closeout evidence files were outside the review packet; this review is one input to those files.
review_text:
Confirmed â€” the packet is 2137 lines and I've reviewed all of it.

# GO

Read-only review of `/tmp/lfos-rp00-p02-m04-s06-review-packet.diff` only. No files written, no commands run, no repository/product state mutated. Conducted under the claude-opus-4-8 effort=max contract.

## Summary of what the diff does
S06 adds `precheckControlPlaneClaudeReviewAuditHint` plus its policy, prechecker, result-field freeze, two validators, getter, fixture, README line, contract definition, and contract-validator coverage. The precheck consumes a validated S05 permission result, requires a nonblank carried `audit_event_ref`, emits a frozen metadata-only audit-hint receipt, allows both Matter-scoped and firm-level (`matter_id: null` â†’ `object_id: "firm_level_claude_review"`) synthetic metadata, and fails closed otherwise. Current subphase â†’ S06 (`production_ready`), `next_subphase`/handoff â†’ S07, M04 left open.

## Findings

**P0:** none

**P1:** none

**P2:** none

The implementation matches the stated intent precisely:
- Fail-closed coverage is complete and verified by the result assertion + tests + contract validator: missing/invalid S05 object, wrong `permission_precheck_subphase_id`, wrong entrypoint, wrong model/effort/non-read-only, missing/blank `audit_event_ref`, non-`allow_metadata_only`/unpassed permission, unsatisfied `permission_decision_ref`, every forbidden audit claim (incl. falsy-non-false like `0` treated as a positive claim), unknown truthy claims, audit-bypass/ledger/event-write, runtime-Claude/review-queue, runtime-permission/AuthZ/permission-engine, review-gate-bypass, and source-completion claims (`service.js:965`, `validators.js:1250`).
- No side effects: pure function returning `Object.freeze`d result; all write/runtime/audit/AuthZ flags emitted `false` and asserted `false`, `no_real_data: true`, `writes_product_state: false` (`service.js:1023`, nested `audit_hint` no-write flags validated at `validators.js:1334`).
- Boundary preserved: `completesSourceMicroPhase: false`, `next_subphase`/handoff `RP00.P02.M04.S07` consistent across policy, prechecker, fixture, contract, and `requiredClosedSubphases` only advances to include S05 (`scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs:1798`).
- Cross-artifact consistency enforced: result fields, required-input fields (= canonical S05 result fields), review-context/evidence/gate arrays, forbidden-claim and fail-closed lists are JSON-equality-checked across policy module, contract definition, and fixture; drift is caught. Tests exercise the real S02â†’S03â†’S04â†’S05â†’S06 chain rather than hand-built stubs (not validation theater).

## P3 observations (non-blocking)
- The 21 bulk forbidden-claim cases and 9 result-drift overrides use the `Error`-constructor matcher with a descriptive label rather than per-message regexes, so a throw for an unintended reason would still pass; the highest-value cases (missing result, `append_audit_ledger`, unknown claim, wrong markers/entrypoint/model, blank `audit_event_ref`, denied/failed/unsatisfied) do have regex assertions. Matches existing codebase style (`service.test.js:1609`).
- The combined model/effort/read-only check and the `audit_event_ref` `typeof`/blank check aren't decomposed into per-branch unit tests (only `model_id` and empty-string are directly exercised); behavior is still fail-closed and the full input is independently re-validated by `assertControlPlaneClaudeReviewPermissionPrecheckResult` (`service.js:976`).
- The closeout evidence files the contract references (`docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p02-m04-s06/*`) are outside this packet and cannot be verified from the diff; this review is itself one of those inputs.

## Production readiness
After adjudication, with no P0/P1/P2 findings present, the S06 audit-hint-precheck slice is **production_ready** â€” contingent only on the out-of-packet closeout evidence under `docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p02-m04-s06/` existing as the contract asserts (H00 validators passing, command evidence, adjudication, construction inspection).

## Required-review qualification
**Yes** â€” this is a single, completed, read-only Claude review of the S06 diff packet under model `claude-opus-4-8`, effort=max, with no mutations, and so qualifies as the one required read-only Claude review for RP00.P02.M04.S06.
